meta.description: Validate minimum approval count and prevent self-approval via GitHub API or GitLab API

assessment.message: Minimum one non-author approval is required

error.message: PRs can be merged without peer review.
error.guidance: Ensure the pull request rule requires at least one approving review.

assessment.message: New, reviewable commits pushed will dismiss previous PR review approvals.

error.message: Approvals are not dismissed when new commits are pushed.
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Dismiss stale pull request approvals when new commits are pushed"

assessment.message: The most recent push must be approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.

error.message: The most recent reviewable push is not approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Require approval of the most recent reviewable push"
